data.title: Robust Encryption
data.description: Messages, calls, and media are end-to-end encrypted, ensuring privacy and security.
data.technical_spec: Signal Protocol implemented for encrypting all user communications.

data.title: Spam Detection
data.description: Advanced algorithms and machine learning models identify and mitigate spam and phishing threats.
data.technical_spec: Real-time monitoring systems with AI-based patterns recognition.

data.title: Account Security Measures
data.description: Multiple layers of account security, including two-step verification and biometric authentication.
data.technical_spec: Optional two-step verification; face/fingerprint recognition for secure access.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent security reviews and penetration testing to identify and address vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Annual penetration testing by third-party security firms.

data.title: Real-time Threat Intelligence
data.description: Updated threat intelligence feeds to adapt to emerging security threats.
data.technical_spec: Integration with global threat intelligence services.
